root_cause: O_RULES Tier 3 opened the violation path from awareness plus continuation without a known-rule anchor.
expected_behavior: Product Alpha remains candidate-only and does not infer a rule violation unless known-rule evidence anchors awareness.
actual_behavior: Candidate-only Product Alpha test detected an over-eager O_RULES branch.
fix_required: Yes: require hasKnownRule && hasAwareness for the partial triad branch.
methodology_impact: Preserved P/O/A taxonomy; no canonical tree or fixture rewrite.
product_impact: Prevents unsupported violation candidate in Product Alpha output.

root_cause: /api/analyze exposed unstable/raw error code/message patterns and did not enforce the requested ANALYZE_* envelope.
expected_behavior: Public response uses stable ANALYZE_* code, stable message, and requestId without raw message, stack, table, or constraint details.
actual_behavior: Sanitization trial failed before the stable envelope was implemented.
fix_required: Yes: buildErrorResponse, stable code enum, sanitized logging, and auth response mapping.
product_impact: Improves API safety and client contract.

root_cause: Runtime/module gate rejected authorized /api/analyze feature-flag usage and protected API changes without semantic contract checks.
expected_behavior: Protected path changes are allowed only when semantic sanitization and output-lock contracts pass.
actual_behavior: Diff/path-only guard blocked legitimate authorized changes.
fix_required: Yes: replace broad path rejection with semantic helper assertions.
product_impact: Keeps runtime boundary strict while allowing authorized closure work.

root_cause: Integrity gate rejected the authorized canonical-tree O_RULES correction by path only.
expected_behavior: Canonical-tree edits are permitted only when the conservative O_RULES contract and final-output locks hold.
actual_behavior: Path-only guard failed after the Product Alpha fix.
fix_required: Yes.
product_impact: Allows the real Product Alpha bug fix to ship.

root_cause: Product Beta integrity gate rejected the authorized canonical-tree O_RULES correction by path only.
expected_behavior: Behavior contract gate protects methodology and final-output locks.
actual_behavior: Path-only guard blocked legitimate fix.
fix_required: Yes.

root_cause: First server-backed canonical run used an undersized runner timeout for a real UI/API expanded cohort test.
expected_behavior: Long real UI/API tests have rational timeout budget and report no race timeout when they pass.
actual_behavior: First server run exited 143 around 180s.
fix_required: Yes: REAL_UI/REAL_API timeout increased to 480s.

root_cause: First server-backed run omitted EVENT_PURGE_SYNTHETIC_EXECUTE_ENABLED=true, so the synthetic purge execution test correctly failed closed.
expected_behavior: Synthetic purge execution test runs only with explicit synthetic flag; real human purge remains disabled.
actual_behavior: Returned EVENT_PURGE_NOT_ELIGIBLE without flag.
fix_required: No product change; rerun with explicit synthetic flag.

root_cause: Naturalistic validation recall remains below readiness thresholds by documented methodology status.
expected_behavior: Executed as validation gate with NOT_READY status, not as required regression failure.
actual_behavior: Exits 1 with ENGINE_NATURALISTIC_VALIDATION_NOT_READY.
fix_required: No technical fix in this closure; requires future methodology/recall work without changing expected outputs.
product_impact: Blocks production/scientific readiness claims, not technical regression closure.
